forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Cloudy, with a low around 54. West southwest wind around 8 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny. High near 63, with temperatures falling to around 61 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 6 to 13 mph.

weather_report:
As the early morning settles over Downtown San Francisco, a blanket of cloudiness envelops the city, blending seamlessly with the cool air that drifts in from the Pacific. The temperature hovers around a mild fifty-four, inviting a somnolent pause as the day prepares to awaken. A gentle west-southwest breeze whispers through the streets, echoing the city's sleepy rhythm. While the clouds hold a certain charm, they also indicate a lingering marine layer, a tapestry of moisture that hangs close to the coastline.

As the sun begins its ascent, the promise of a partly sunny day unfolds. By midday, temperatures are expected to dance around sixty-three, easing to sixty-one as afternoon approaches. Layering will be key; a light jacket over a T-shirt will offer comfort in the cooler morning hours before the warmth gently lingers through the more temperate afternoon. Given these conditions, a casual stroll along the Embarcadero, perhaps stopping for a warm coffee at one of the bay-side cafés, could offer a serene respite from the usual hustle of urban life. Alternatively, browsing the local boutiques nestled in the heart of the city can also provide a lovely escape. The fog may keep the iconic Golden Gate Bridge coyly veiled for now, but it too will lift, revealing a picturesque backdrop worthy of exploration.
